title: Didymocarpus azureus
taxonomy: Didymocarpus azureus is classified in the family Gesneriaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the African violet family. This family is part of the order Lamiales, a large and diverse group of flowering plants. The genus Didymocarpus is a genus of flowering plants native to tropical Asia, and D. azureus is one of its species. The species D. azureus is native to the Himalayas and other parts of the Indian subcontinent. It is a herbaceous plant with blue or purple flowers, and is often used in ornamental gardening.
uses: Didymocarpus azureus is a plant species that has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties.
